creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
I have not updated the port intentionally, as that version of Wine does
not work properly, according to my tests.

ports/31247 (Wine port description updates), which still needs to be
installed, updates the port with notes concerning this.

Concerning the current PR (ports/31241), I just verified that the current
port still fetches fine, so I suggest to close it, and commit my patch
from ports/31247.

Gerald (Wine port maintainer)
-- 
Gerald "Jerry" pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at http://www.dbai.tuwien.ac.at/~pfeifer/
